They are too interested in change. They don't seem to analyze whether the results of a change will be better or worse. They seem to be more interested in special interest groups than the silent majority. The Democrats traditionally have voted for war -- they got us in the World War I, II, Korean war and Vietnam War. They are too willing to go to war and for the wrong reasons. Their reasons have been economic and political thought propaganda and have made everyday people go to war to sacrifice for what the people thought are good reasons -- the politicians have orchestrated national/world atmospheres that require wars for politicians and their cronies to get gain and make profits.
There are a lot of good people in the Democratic party at the grass roots level. It is a party in a two party system that is effective in running our nation.
It's a party in a two party system that works and there are a lot of good people at the grass roots level.
